name: Baked Chicken Enchiladas
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Mix flour with stock and heat until slightly thickened.
3. Add whipping cream (or half & half), green onion, salt, and pepper. Bring to a boil.
4. Stir in sour cream until well mixed.
5. Dip each tortilla in cream sauce, then arrange chicken and strip of pimento down the center of each tortilla.
6. Roll up and place in a greased baking dish (or spray with food release) seam side down.
7. Pour remaining cream sauce over all and bake for 30 minutes.
8. Remove from oven and sprinkle grated cheese over all. Return to oven until cheese is melted.
9. Arrange coarsely chopped lettuce around the edges of the dish.
10. Serve with green chile sauce, salsa cruda, or Pico de Gallo.
Recipe easily expands to serve a crowd. Excellent for buffet service.
